text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nice, City! Now, for the next one, I want you
to relax...

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
That's it! A glimpse of the real you as you spend
your day at school... That's perfect!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm going to look over what we've got so
far. You can all take a break!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Okay.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You too. It's not often you come along with me to
my shoots. So, what do you think?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well, we are pros.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Although it feels a bit weird having a shoot at the
school I go to every day.

It all started a few days ago. Gold City asked me
for help getting permission to do a photo shoot
at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's for the magazine I'm a resident model for.
They're doing a feature about my debut.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So they want some photos showing me at the
academy—you know, to get a sense of my
everyday life.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Thanks. I'll contact the editor to have them reach
out.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If you're interested, you can come see the shoot.
It's literally just taking pictures, though.

I was interested to see what she's like at work,
so... here I am.

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! We really appreciate you setting this all
up for us! Thanks to your help, this is going to be
a great feature for sure!

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text:
I think your presence helped City relax more than
normal, as well!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That's not true. Trainer's got nothing to do with
that—seriously.

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text:
You shot that down quick! Listen, I've been
working with you since you were a child, and I've
never seen you act so kind and gentle before.

As a regular model for this magazine, Gold City
seems to get along well with all the staff at the
shoot.
But...

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text: You're seriously amazing, City.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? How so?

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text:
To think you're already a successful model, but
then you want to run in the Twinkle Series on top
of that!

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if that unrelenting ambition of yours is
the real key to your beauty.

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text:
Everyone in the editorial department respects
you. Despite your popularity, your self-discipline
keeps you striving to improve yourself.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... But self improvement isn't the reason
why I run.

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text:
I know. I haven't forgotten what you said about
wanting to keep some distance from your identity
as a model.

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text:
But that means you want to refine your image
even further, right? It's almost like you're a monk
seeking enlightenment!

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you'll be able to use what you gain from
racing to benefit you in the future. I'm rooting for
you!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: That's not it. The reason why I run is...

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Never mind, I was just thinking about your
compliment.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It made me... happy. Hehe...

Is it frustration or disappointment? Perhaps she's
hurt that her serious attempt at running is being
treated as a mere accessory.
Realizing this, I decide I can't keep quiet.
choice_data_list: I hope you'll pay attention to her running.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Trainer?
choice_data_list: The reason City runs is for the "now."

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text: Um... Okay?
choice_data_list:
You'll understand if you watch her race. So
please, come and watch!

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text:
Um, of course, the editorial team is going to
come, but...

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text:
Uh... let's resume shooting, shall we? We're
cutting it a bit close for time. Are you ready,
City?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yes, I can go.

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text: Okay. Trainer, please stay and watch!

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text: Did I... touch on something I shouldn't have?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: No...

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text:
Okay, good work today! Look forward to its
printing in the magazine!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Trainer, about what you said during the break...
choice_data_list: I should've minded my own business.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you realize that. My coworkers are all
really good people, so just be careful.
choice_data_list: But I didn't want to see you forcing a smile.
But I didn't want to see you forcing a smile.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So... you noticed.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I know they have nothing but good intentions. I
know they genuinely respect me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Considering my track record, it's only natural they
consider racing as my side hustle.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm already aware of all that, so I can do without
the forced help.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Or at least, I should be able to. But you're right... it was shocking to hear.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Especially from someone who's been around me
since I was little...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It's like they just don't know how I feel.
choice_data_list:
Then communicate it to them through your
running.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That's what I'm trying to do. Don't need you to
tell me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Still... you already get me, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Nothing. Let's go practice!
